name: Haloy
description: Self-hosted deployment tool positioned between Coolify/Dokploy and Kamal for simple container deployments.

seo.title: Haloy — CI/CD for Applications
seo.meta_description: Haloy: Self-hosted deployment tool positioned between Coolify/Dokploy and Kamal for simple container deployments.

when_to_use: Self-hosted container deployments simpler than Kamal
Git-push based deployment for small cloud deployments
Lightweight alternative to Coolify for solo developers
Deploy Docker containers without Kubernetes overhead

pros: Simple container deploys without the Kubernetes tax
Sits between Kamal's simplicity and Coolify's UI
Lightweight enough for a single VPS
review.verdict: A reasonable Kamal-adjacent deploy tool for solo devs, but still proving itself.
review.best_for: Solo devs and small teams shipping containers to one or two VPS hosts.
review.not_for: Teams needing mature multi-region, multi-tenant deployment tooling.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Free/open-source — no commercial pricing, no HWM.
